LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF HBL HOLDINGS, LLC'S MOTION TO SEAL SELECT PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO SEAL IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS DISMISSED THE COMPLAINT AND IT IS THEREFORE NOT AT ISSUE AS A BASIS FOR ADJUDICATION. ACCORDINGLY, NO FINDINGS ARE REQUIRED UNDER RULE OF COURT 2.550. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURTS RULING. THE SUBMITTED PROPOSED ORDER IS TO INCLUDE THE DATE THE DOCUMENT BEING SEALED WAS FILED, COMPLETE TITLE OF THE FILED DOCUMENT AND COMPLETE TRANSCATION NUMBER. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-15-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2026 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Continued To Apr-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Select Portions Of Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HBL HOLDINGS, LLC'S Motion To Seal Select Portions Of Plaintiff'S Complaint.

The unopposed motion to seal is granted. Defendant has dismissed the complaint and it is therefore not at issue as a basis for adjudication. Accordingly, no findings are required under Rule of Court 2.550.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the courts ruling. The submitted proposed order is to include the date the document was filed, complete title of the filed document and complete transcation number.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Select Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HBL HOLDINGS, LLC'S Motion To Seal Select Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint.

Off calendar as duplicate entry.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Select Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-29-2026 Continued To Feb-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF HBL HOLDINGS, LLC,'s, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, Motion To Seal Select Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Continued on the court's own motion to February 24, 2026. Plaintiff's unopposed motion to seal is supported by an attorney declaration reciting facts on information and belief. This is an insufficient evidentiary showing for factual findings. A motion to seal pursuant to Rule 2.550 requires the court to make factual findings. Plaintiff may supplement with a proper declaration. In addition, Plaintiff is directed to supply courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 301 at least five court days in advance of the hearing.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
